text.title: OKR Cascade for Multi-Squad Product Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals to apply / skip / route-elsewhere. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Product spans 3-6 squads on a shared customer surface?

conclusion.verdict: single-squad product; use simpler OKR or methodologies-summary
use the org's chosen framework consistently
build full cascade with dependency edges + weekly cadence
